# CLI Reference (`ct`)

Complete command reference for the `ct` CLI. Auto-generated from `ct --help`; regenerate with `npm run docs` (`npm run docs:check` fails if it has drifted). For a quick-start overview, see the [CLI section of the README](../README.md#cli).

<!-- CT_CLI_DOCS:START -->
<!-- Auto-generated by scripts/generate-cli-docs.js. Do not edit by hand; run `npm run docs`. -->

## `ct`

```
ct [--json] [--debug] [--timeout=SECONDS] <command> [subcommand] [args]

Commands:
  ct task      Manage tasks
  ct timer     Control the timer
  ct time      Manage time entries
  ct report    Generate reports
  ct comment   Manage comments
  ct category  Manage categories
  ct import    Import tasks from file
  ct status    Show app status
  ct version   Show version
  ct plugin    Manage external plugins

Options:
      --version  Show version number                                   [boolean]
      --json     Output in JSON format                [boolean] [default: false]
      --debug    Log HTTP request/response to stderr  [boolean] [default: false]
      --timeout  Request timeout in seconds               [number] [default: 10]
  -h, --help     Show help                                             [boolean]
```

### `ct task`

```
ct task

Manage tasks

Commands:
  ct task list                  List tasks
  ct task get <id>              Get a task by ID
  ct task create <title>        Create a new task
  ct task update <id>           Update a task
  ct task delete [ids..]        Soft-delete task(s)
  ct task restore [ids..]       Restore deleted task(s)
  ct task purge                 Permanently delete task(s)
  ct task reorder <ids..>       Set task sort order
  ct task batch-update <ids..>  Batch update tasks
  ct task report <id>           Mark all un-reported time entries on a task as
                                reported
  ct task link <id>             Link a task to a remote ticket served by a
                                plugin
  ct task unlink <id>           Remove the plugin link from a task
  ct task unreport <id>         Reset reported state on every time entry of a
                                task

Options:
      --version  Show version number                                   [boolean]
      --json     Output in JSON format                [boolean] [default: false]
      --debug    Log HTTP request/response to stderr  [boolean] [default: false]
      --timeout  Request timeout in seconds               [number] [default: 10]
  -h, --help     Show help                                             [boolean]
```

#### `ct task list`

```
ct task list

List tasks

Options:
      --version         Show version number                            [boolean]
      --json            Output in JSON format         [boolean] [default: false]
      --debug           Log HTTP request/response to stderr
                                                      [boolean] [default: false]
      --timeout         Request timeout in seconds        [number] [default: 10]
      --done            Show completed tasks                           [boolean]
      --deleted         Show deleted tasks (recycle bin)               [boolean]
      --all             Show all tasks                                 [boolean]
  -s, --search          Search title and description                    [string]
      --status          Filter by status                                [string]
      --source          Filter by source                                [string]
      --category        Filter by category ID                           [string]
      --has-unreported  Show only tasks with un-reported time entries  [boolean]
      --uncategorized   Show only tasks with no categories assigned    [boolean]
      --date-start      Only tasks with a time entry on/after YYYY-MM-DD[string]
      --date-end        Only tasks with a time entry on/before YYYY-MM-DD
                        (inclusive end-of-day)                          [string]
      --sort            Sort: manual|recent|created|alphabetical|most-time-today
                                                                        [string]
      --limit           Max results                       [number] [default: 50]
      --offset          Skip results                       [number] [default: 0]
      --full-id         Show full UUID instead of prefix
                                                      [boolean] [default: false]
  -h, --help            Show help                                      [boolean]
```

#### `ct task get`

```
ct task get <id>

Get a task by ID

Positionals:
  id  UUID, prefix, or name substring                        [string] [required]

Options:
      --version  Show version number                                   [boolean]
      --json     Output in JSON format                [boolean] [default: false]
      --debug    Log HTTP request/response to stderr  [boolean] [default: false]
      --timeout  Request timeout in seconds               [number] [default: 10]
  -h, --help     Show help                                             [boolean]
```

#### `ct task create`

```
ct task create <title>

Create a new task

Positionals:
  title                                                      [string] [required]

Options:
      --version      Show version number                               [boolean]
      --json         Output in JSON format            [boolean] [default: false]
      --debug        Log HTTP request/response to stderr
                                                      [boolean] [default: false]
      --timeout      Request timeout in seconds           [number] [default: 10]
  -d, --description                                                     [string]
      --status      [string] [choices: "todo", "in-progress", "done", "blocked"]
      --source   [string] [choices: "ad-hoc", "email", "meeting-prep", "plugin"]
      --category     Category ID(s)                                      [array]
  -h, --help         Show help                                         [boolean]
```

#### `ct task update`

```
ct task update <id>

Update a task

Positionals:
  id  UUID, prefix, or name substring                        [string] [required]

Options:
      --version      Show version number                               [boolean]
      --json         Output in JSON format            [boolean] [default: false]
      --debug        Log HTTP request/response to stderr
                                                      [boolean] [default: false]
      --timeout      Request timeout in seconds           [number] [default: 10]
      --title                                                           [string]
  -d, --description                                                     [string]
      --status      [string] [choices: "todo", "in-progress", "done", "blocked"]
      --source   [string] [choices: "ad-hoc", "email", "meeting-prep", "plugin"]
      --notes                                                           [string]
      --category     Category ID(s)                                      [array]
  -h, --help         Show help                                         [boolean]
```

#### `ct task delete`

```
ct task delete [ids..]

Soft-delete task(s)

Positionals:
  ids  UUID(s), prefix(es), or name(s)                     [array] [default: []]

Options:
      --version  Show version number                                   [boolean]
      --json     Output in JSON format                [boolean] [default: false]
      --debug    Log HTTP request/response to stderr  [boolean] [default: false]
      --timeout  Request timeout in seconds               [number] [default: 10]
      --all      Soft-delete ALL tasks (moves to recycle bin)          [boolean]
      --confirm  Required when using --all                             [boolean]
  -h, --help     Show help                                             [boolean]
```

#### `ct task restore`

```
ct task restore [ids..]

Restore deleted task(s)

Positionals:
  ids  UUID(s), prefix(es), or name(s)                     [array] [default: []]

Options:
      --version  Show version number                                   [boolean]
      --json     Output in JSON format                [boolean] [default: false]
      --debug    Log HTTP request/response to stderr  [boolean] [default: false]
      --timeout  Request timeout in seconds               [number] [default: 10]
      --all      Restore ALL tasks from recycle bin                    [boolean]
  -h, --help     Show help                                             [boolean]
```

#### `ct task purge`

```
ct task purge

Permanently delete task(s)

Options:
      --version  Show version number                                   [boolean]
      --json     Output in JSON format                [boolean] [default: false]
      --debug    Log HTTP request/response to stderr  [boolean] [default: false]
      --timeout  Request timeout in seconds               [number] [default: 10]
      --all      Empty recycle bin                                     [boolean]
      --id       UUID, prefix, or name substring                        [string]
  -h, --help     Show help                                             [boolean]
```

```
ct task reorder <ids..>

Set task sort order

Positionals:
  ids  UUID(s), prefix(es), or name(s)          [array] [required] [default: []]

Options:

      --json     Output in JSON format                [boolean] [default: false]

      --timeout  Request timeout in seconds               [number] [default: 10]

#### `ct task batch-update`

```
ct task batch-update <ids..>

Batch update tasks

Positionals:
  ids  UUID(s), prefix(es), or name(s)          [array] [required] [default: []]

Options:
      --version   Show version number                                  [boolean]
      --json      Output in JSON format               [boolean] [default: false]
      --debug     Log HTTP request/response to stderr [boolean] [default: false]
      --timeout   Request timeout in seconds              [number] [default: 10]
      --status      [string] [choices: "todo", "in-progress", "done", "blocked"]
      --source   [string] [choices: "ad-hoc", "email", "meeting-prep", "plugin"]
      --category  Category IDs to add to each task (additive; existing
                  categories are preserved)                              [array]
  -h, --help      Show help                                            [boolean]
```

#### `ct task report`

```
ct task report <id>

Mark all un-reported time entries on a task as reported

Positionals:
  id  UUID, prefix, or name substring                        [string] [required]

Options:
      --version  Show version number                                   [boolean]
      --json     Output in JSON format                [boolean] [default: false]

      --timeout  Request timeout in seconds               [number] [default: 10]
  -h, --help     Show help                                             [boolean]
```

#### `ct task link`

```
ct task link <id>

Link a task to a remote ticket served by a plugin

Positionals:
  id  Task UUID, prefix, or name substring                   [string] [required]

Options:
      --version   Show version number                                  [boolean]
      --json      Output in JSON format               [boolean] [default: false]
      --debug     Log HTTP request/response to stderr [boolean] [default: false]
      --timeout   Request timeout in seconds              [number] [default: 10]
      --plugin    Plugin id (e.g. "ado")                     [string] [required]
      --external  External ticket id (e.g. ADO work item number)
                                                             [string] [required]
      --mirror    Full mirror: also flips source so the task is locked and
                  refreshable                         [boolean] [default: false]
  -h, --help      Show help                                            [boolean]
```

#### `ct task unlink`

```
ct task unlink <id>

Remove the plugin link from a task

Positionals:
  id  Task UUID, prefix, or name substring                   [string] [required]

Options:
      --version  Show version number                                   [boolean]
      --json     Output in JSON format                [boolean] [default: false]
      --debug    Log HTTP request/response to stderr  [boolean] [default: false]
      --timeout  Request timeout in seconds               [number] [default: 10]
  -h, --help     Show help                                             [boolean]
```

ct task unreport <id>

Positionals:

### `ct timer`

```
ct timer

Control the timer

Commands:
  ct timer start <task-id>  Start timer for a task
  ct timer stop             Stop the active timer
  ct timer status           Show active timer

Options:
      --version  Show version number                                   [boolean]
      --json     Output in JSON format                [boolean] [default: false]
      --debug    Log HTTP request/response to stderr  [boolean] [default: false]
      --timeout  Request timeout in seconds               [number] [default: 10]
  -h, --help     Show help                                             [boolean]
```

#### `ct timer start`

```
ct timer start <task-id>

Start timer for a task

Positionals:
  task-id  UUID, prefix, or name substring                   [string] [required]

Options:
      --version  Show version number                                   [boolean]
      --json     Output in JSON format                [boolean] [default: false]
      --debug    Log HTTP request/response to stderr  [boolean] [default: false]
      --timeout  Request timeout in seconds               [number] [default: 10]
  -h, --help     Show help                                             [boolean]
```

#### `ct timer stop`

```
ct timer stop

Stop the active timer

Options:
      --version  Show version number                                   [boolean]
      --json     Output in JSON format                [boolean] [default: false]
      --debug    Log HTTP request/response to stderr  [boolean] [default: false]
      --timeout  Request timeout in seconds               [number] [default: 10]
  -h, --help     Show help                                             [boolean]
```

```
ct timer status

Show active timer

Options:
      --version  Show version number                                   [boolean]
      --json     Output in JSON format                [boolean] [default: false]
      --debug    Log HTTP request/response to stderr  [boolean] [default: false]
      --timeout  Request timeout in seconds               [number] [default: 10]
  -h, --help     Show help                                             [boolean]
```

### `ct time`

```
ct time

Manage time entries

Commands:
  ct time list <task-id>  List time entries for a task
  ct time add <task-id>   Add a manual time entry
  ct time update <id>     Update a time entry
  ct time delete <id>     Delete a time entry
  ct time today           Show total time tracked today
  ct time report <id>     Mark a single time entry as reported externally
  ct time unreport <id>   Mark a single time entry as not yet reported
  ct time mark-reported   Bulk mark/unmark reported across many tasks,
                          optionally within a date range

Options:
      --version  Show version number                                   [boolean]
      --json     Output in JSON format                [boolean] [default: false]
      --debug    Log HTTP request/response to stderr  [boolean] [default: false]
      --timeout  Request timeout in seconds               [number] [default: 10]
  -h, --help     Show help                                             [boolean]
```

#### `ct time list`

```
ct time list <task-id>

List time entries for a task

Positionals:
  task-id  UUID, prefix, or name substring                   [string] [required]

Options:
      --version  Show version number                                   [boolean]
      --json     Output in JSON format                [boolean] [default: false]
      --debug    Log HTTP request/response to stderr  [boolean] [default: false]
      --timeout  Request timeout in seconds               [number] [default: 10]
      --limit                                             [number] [default: 20]
      --offset                                             [number] [default: 0]
  -h, --help     Show help                                             [boolean]
```

#### `ct time add`

```
ct time add <task-id>

Add a manual time entry

Positionals:
  task-id  UUID, prefix, or name substring                   [string] [required]

Options:
      --version   Show version number                                  [boolean]
      --json      Output in JSON format               [boolean] [default: false]
      --debug     Log HTTP request/response to stderr [boolean] [default: false]
      --timeout   Request timeout in seconds              [number] [default: 10]
      --start     Start time (ISO 8601)                                 [string]
      --end       End time (ISO 8601)                                   [string]
      --duration  Duration (e.g., 1h30m, 1:30, 90)                      [string]
      --note                                              [string] [default: ""]
  -h, --help      Show help                                            [boolean]
```

#### `ct time update`

```
ct time update <id>

Update a time entry

Positionals:
  id                                                         [string] [required]

Options:
      --version  Show version number                                   [boolean]
      --json     Output in JSON format                [boolean] [default: false]
      --debug    Log HTTP request/response to stderr  [boolean] [default: false]
      --timeout  Request timeout in seconds               [number] [default: 10]
      --start                                                           [string]
      --end                                                             [string]
      --note                                                            [string]
  -h, --help     Show help                                             [boolean]
```

#### `ct time delete`

```
ct time delete <id>

Delete a time entry

Positionals:
  id                                                         [string] [required]

Options:
      --version  Show version number                                   [boolean]
      --json     Output in JSON format                [boolean] [default: false]
      --debug    Log HTTP request/response to stderr  [boolean] [default: false]
      --timeout  Request timeout in seconds               [number] [default: 10]
  -h, --help     Show help                                             [boolean]
```

```
ct time today

Show total time tracked today

Options:
      --version  Show version number                                   [boolean]
      --json     Output in JSON format                [boolean] [default: false]
      --debug    Log HTTP request/response to stderr  [boolean] [default: false]

#### `ct time report`

```
ct time report <id>

Mark a single time entry as reported externally

Positionals:
  id                                                         [string] [required]

Options:
      --version  Show version number                                   [boolean]
      --json     Output in JSON format                [boolean] [default: false]
      --debug    Log HTTP request/response to stderr  [boolean] [default: false]
      --timeout  Request timeout in seconds               [number] [default: 10]
  -h, --help     Show help                                             [boolean]
```

#### `ct time unreport`

```
ct time unreport <id>

Mark a single time entry as not yet reported

Positionals:
  id                                                         [string] [required]

Options:
      --version  Show version number                                   [boolean]
      --json     Output in JSON format                [boolean] [default: false]
      --debug    Log HTTP request/response to stderr  [boolean] [default: false]
      --timeout  Request timeout in seconds               [number] [default: 10]
  -h, --help     Show help                                             [boolean]
```

#### `ct time mark-reported`

```
ct time mark-reported

Bulk mark/unmark reported across many tasks, optionally within a date range

Options:
      --version     Show version number                                [boolean]
      --json        Output in JSON format             [boolean] [default: false]
      --debug       Log HTTP request/response to stderr
                                                      [boolean] [default: false]
      --timeout     Request timeout in seconds            [number] [default: 10]
      --tasks       Task UUID(s)/prefix(es)                   [array] [required]
      --start       Lower-bound date YYYY-MM-DD (inclusive)             [string]
      --end         Upper-bound date YYYY-MM-DD (inclusive end-of-day)  [string]
      --unreported  Clear reportedAt instead of setting it
                                                      [boolean] [default: false]
  -h, --help        Show help                                          [boolean]
```

### `ct report`

```
ct report

Generate reports

Commands:
  ct report summary  Plain text summary report grouped by date
  ct report detail   Detailed per-entry report
  ct report chart    Chart data (date x task x seconds)
  ct report export   Export CSV report

Options:
      --version  Show version number                                   [boolean]
      --json     Output in JSON format                [boolean] [default: false]
      --debug    Log HTTP request/response to stderr  [boolean] [default: false]
      --timeout  Request timeout in seconds               [number] [default: 10]
  -h, --help     Show help                                             [boolean]
```

#### `ct report summary`

```
ct report summary

Plain text summary report grouped by date

Options:
      --version  Show version number                                   [boolean]
      --json     Output in JSON format                [boolean] [default: false]
      --debug    Log HTTP request/response to stderr  [boolean] [default: false]
      --timeout  Request timeout in seconds               [number] [default: 10]
      --from     Start date (YYYY-MM-DD)                     [string] [required]
      --to       End date (YYYY-MM-DD)                       [string] [required]
  -h, --help     Show help                                             [boolean]
```

#### `ct report detail`

```
ct report detail

Detailed per-entry report

Options:
      --version  Show version number                                   [boolean]
      --json     Output in JSON format                [boolean] [default: false]
      --debug    Log HTTP request/response to stderr  [boolean] [default: false]
      --timeout  Request timeout in seconds               [number] [default: 10]
      --from                                                 [string] [required]
      --to                                                   [string] [required]
  -h, --help     Show help                                             [boolean]
```

#### `ct report chart`

```
ct report chart

Chart data (date x task x seconds)

Options:
      --version  Show version number                                   [boolean]
      --json     Output in JSON format                [boolean] [default: false]
      --debug    Log HTTP request/response to stderr  [boolean] [default: false]

```

#### `ct report export`

```
ct report export

Export CSV report

Options:
      --version  Show version number                                   [boolean]
      --json     Output in JSON format                [boolean] [default: false]
      --debug    Log HTTP request/response to stderr  [boolean] [default: false]
      --timeout  Request timeout in seconds               [number] [default: 10]
      --from                                                 [string] [required]
      --to                                                   [string] [required]
      --out      Output file path (default: stdout)                     [string]
  -h, --help     Show help                                             [boolean]
```

### `ct comment`

```
ct comment

Manage comments

Commands:
  ct comment list <task-id>        List comments for a task
  ct comment add <task-id> <body>  Add a comment to a task
  ct comment update <id>           Update a comment
  ct comment delete <id>           Delete a comment

Options:
      --version  Show version number                                   [boolean]
      --json     Output in JSON format                [boolean] [default: false]
      --debug    Log HTTP request/response to stderr  [boolean] [default: false]
      --timeout  Request timeout in seconds               [number] [default: 10]
  -h, --help     Show help                                             [boolean]
```

```
ct comment list <task-id>

Positionals:
  task-id  UUID, prefix, or name substring                   [string] [required]

      --debug    Log HTTP request/response to stderr  [boolean] [default: false]
      --timeout  Request timeout in seconds               [number] [default: 10]
  -h, --help     Show help                                             [boolean]
```

ct comment add <task-id> <body>

Add a comment to a task

Positionals:

  body                                                       [string] [required]

Options:
      --version   Show version number                                  [boolean]

      --debug     Log HTTP request/response to stderr [boolean] [default: false]

ct comment update <id>

  id                                                         [string] [required]

### `ct category`

```
ct category

Manage categories

Commands:
  ct category list                          List all categories
  ct category create <name>                 Create a category
  ct category update <id>                   Update a category
  ct category delete <id>                   Delete a category
  ct category assign <task-id>              Assign categories to a task
  <category-ids..>

Options:
      --version  Show version number                                   [boolean]
      --json     Output in JSON format                [boolean] [default: false]
      --debug    Log HTTP request/response to stderr  [boolean] [default: false]
      --timeout  Request timeout in seconds               [number] [default: 10]
  -h, --help     Show help                                             [boolean]
```

      --version  Show version number                                   [boolean]

      --timeout  Request timeout in seconds               [number] [default: 10]
  -h, --help     Show help                                             [boolean]
```

      --timeout  Request timeout in seconds               [number] [default: 10]
      --color    Hex color (e.g., #ff0000)         [string] [default: "#888888"]

```

#### `ct category assign`

```
ct category assign <task-id> <category-ids..>

Assign categories to a task

Positionals:
  task-id       UUID, prefix, or name substring              [string] [required]
  category-ids                                  [array] [required] [default: []]

Options:
      --version  Show version number                                   [boolean]
      --json     Output in JSON format                [boolean] [default: false]
      --debug    Log HTTP request/response to stderr  [boolean] [default: false]
      --timeout  Request timeout in seconds               [number] [default: 10]
  -h, --help     Show help                                             [boolean]
```

### `ct import`

```
ct import

Import tasks from file

Commands:
  ct import format          Show the expected import file format
  ct import preview <file>  Parse import file and show preview
  ct import execute <file>  Execute import from file

Options:
      --version  Show version number                                   [boolean]
      --json     Output in JSON format                [boolean] [default: false]
      --debug    Log HTTP request/response to stderr  [boolean] [default: false]
      --timeout  Request timeout in seconds               [number] [default: 10]
  -h, --help     Show help                                             [boolean]
```

#### `ct import format`

```
ct import format

Show the expected import file format

Options:
      --version  Show version number                                   [boolean]
      --json     Output in JSON format                [boolean] [default: false]
      --debug    Log HTTP request/response to stderr  [boolean] [default: false]
      --timeout  Request timeout in seconds               [number] [default: 10]
  -h, --help     Show help                                             [boolean]
```

#### `ct import preview`

```
ct import preview <file>

Parse import file and show preview

Positionals:
  file                                                       [string] [required]

Options:
      --version  Show version number                                   [boolean]
      --json     Output in JSON format                [boolean] [default: false]
      --debug    Log HTTP request/response to stderr  [boolean] [default: false]
      --timeout  Request timeout in seconds               [number] [default: 10]
  -h, --help     Show help                                             [boolean]
```

#### `ct import execute`

```
ct import execute <file>

Execute import from file

Positionals:
  file                                                       [string] [required]

Options:
      --version          Show version number                           [boolean]
      --json             Output in JSON format        [boolean] [default: false]
      --debug            Log HTTP request/response to stderr
                                                      [boolean] [default: false]
      --timeout          Request timeout in seconds       [number] [default: 10]
      --skip-existing    Skip items that match existing tasks
                                                       [boolean] [default: true]
      --update-existing  Update existing tasks instead of skipping
                                                      [boolean] [default: false]
      --dry-run          Preview without executing    [boolean] [default: false]
  -h, --help             Show help                                     [boolean]
```

### `ct status`

```
ct status

Show app status

Options:
      --version  Show version number                                   [boolean]
      --json     Output in JSON format                [boolean] [default: false]
      --debug    Log HTTP request/response to stderr  [boolean] [default: false]
      --timeout  Request timeout in seconds               [number] [default: 10]
  -h, --help     Show help                                             [boolean]
```

### `ct version`

```
ct version

Show version

Options:
      --version  Show version number                                   [boolean]
      --json     Output in JSON format                [boolean] [default: false]
      --debug    Log HTTP request/response to stderr  [boolean] [default: false]
      --timeout  Request timeout in seconds               [number] [default: 10]
  -h, --help     Show help                                             [boolean]
```

### `ct plugin`

```
ct plugin

Manage external plugins

Commands:
  ct plugin install <manifest-file>  Install or update a plugin from a manifest
                                     JSON file
  ct plugin list                     List installed plugins
  ct plugin enable <id>              Enable a plugin (webhook subscriptions
                                     become active)
  ct plugin disable <id>             Disable a plugin (stops receiving events)
  ct plugin uninstall <id>           Remove a plugin and convert its tasks to
                                     local ad-hoc
  ct plugin config                   Get or set plugin configuration
  ct plugin schema <id>              Show a plugin's declared config keys
                                     (required/secret/status/env)
  ct plugin run <id> [pluginArgs..]  Spawn a plugin's entrypoint with CT_* env
                                     vars (extra args are forwarded)

Options:
      --version  Show version number                                   [boolean]
      --json     Output in JSON format                [boolean] [default: false]
      --debug    Log HTTP request/response to stderr  [boolean] [default: false]
      --timeout  Request timeout in seconds               [number] [default: 10]
  -h, --help     Show help                                             [boolean]
```

#### `ct plugin install`

```
ct plugin install <manifest-file>

Install or update a plugin from a manifest JSON file

Positionals:
  manifest-file                                              [string] [required]

Options:
      --version  Show version number                                   [boolean]
      --json     Output in JSON format                [boolean] [default: false]
      --debug    Log HTTP request/response to stderr  [boolean] [default: false]
      --timeout  Request timeout in seconds               [number] [default: 10]
  -h, --help     Show help                                             [boolean]
```

#### `ct plugin list`

```
ct plugin list

List installed plugins

Options:
      --version  Show version number                                   [boolean]
      --json     Output in JSON format                [boolean] [default: false]
      --debug    Log HTTP request/response to stderr  [boolean] [default: false]
      --timeout  Request timeout in seconds               [number] [default: 10]
  -h, --help     Show help                                             [boolean]
```

#### `ct plugin enable`

```
ct plugin enable <id>

Enable a plugin (webhook subscriptions become active)

Positionals:
  id                                                         [string] [required]

Options:
      --version  Show version number                                   [boolean]
      --json     Output in JSON format                [boolean] [default: false]
      --debug    Log HTTP request/response to stderr  [boolean] [default: false]
      --timeout  Request timeout in seconds               [number] [default: 10]
  -h, --help     Show help                                             [boolean]
```

#### `ct plugin disable`

```
ct plugin disable <id>

Disable a plugin (stops receiving events)

Positionals:
  id                                                         [string] [required]

Options:
      --version  Show version number                                   [boolean]
      --json     Output in JSON format                [boolean] [default: false]
      --debug    Log HTTP request/response to stderr  [boolean] [default: false]
      --timeout  Request timeout in seconds               [number] [default: 10]
  -h, --help     Show help                                             [boolean]
```

#### `ct plugin uninstall`

```
ct plugin uninstall <id>

Remove a plugin and convert its tasks to local ad-hoc

Positionals:
  id                                                         [string] [required]

Options:
      --version  Show version number                                   [boolean]
      --json     Output in JSON format                [boolean] [default: false]
      --debug    Log HTTP request/response to stderr  [boolean] [default: false]
      --timeout  Request timeout in seconds               [number] [default: 10]
      --force    Skip the confirmation prompt (required in --json / non-TTY)
                                                      [boolean] [default: false]
  -h, --help     Show help                                             [boolean]
```

#### `ct plugin config`

```
ct plugin config

Get or set plugin configuration

Commands:
  ct plugin config get <id> <key>          Read a plugin config value
  ct plugin config set <id> <key> [value]  Write a plugin config value
  ct plugin config list <id>               List all config keys for a plugin
  ct plugin config delete <id> <key>       Delete a plugin config key

Options:
      --version  Show version number                                   [boolean]
      --json     Output in JSON format                [boolean] [default: false]
      --debug    Log HTTP request/response to stderr  [boolean] [default: false]
      --timeout  Request timeout in seconds               [number] [default: 10]
  -h, --help     Show help                                             [boolean]
```

##### `ct plugin config get`

```
ct plugin config get <id> <key>

Read a plugin config value

Positionals:
  id                                                         [string] [required]
  key                                                        [string] [required]

Options:
      --version  Show version number                                   [boolean]
      --json     Output in JSON format                [boolean] [default: false]
      --debug    Log HTTP request/response to stderr  [boolean] [default: false]
      --timeout  Request timeout in seconds               [number] [default: 10]
      --reveal   Print cleartext for secret keys (default: masked)
                                                      [boolean] [default: false]
  -h, --help     Show help                                             [boolean]
```

##### `ct plugin config set`

```
ct plugin config set <id> <key> [value]

Write a plugin config value

Positionals:
  id                                                         [string] [required]
  key                                                        [string] [required]
  value  Value (omit when using --secret-from-stdin)                    [string]

Options:
      --version            Show version number                         [boolean]
      --json               Output in JSON format      [boolean] [default: false]
      --debug              Log HTTP request/response to stderr
                                                      [boolean] [default: false]
      --timeout            Request timeout in seconds     [number] [default: 10]
      --secret             Force-treat as secret (encrypt via OS keychain)
                                                      [boolean] [default: false]
      --secret-from-stdin  Read value from stdin; implies --secret; keeps value
                           out of shell history       [boolean] [default: false]
      --allow-plaintext    Allow plaintext storage when OS keyring is
                           unavailable                [boolean] [default: false]
  -h, --help               Show help                                   [boolean]
```

##### `ct plugin config list`

```
ct plugin config list <id>

List all config keys for a plugin

Positionals:
  id                                                         [string] [required]

Options:
      --version  Show version number                                   [boolean]
      --json     Output in JSON format                [boolean] [default: false]
      --debug    Log HTTP request/response to stderr  [boolean] [default: false]
      --timeout  Request timeout in seconds               [number] [default: 10]
      --reveal   Print cleartext for secret keys (default: masked)
                                                      [boolean] [default: false]
  -h, --help     Show help                                             [boolean]
```

##### `ct plugin config delete`

```
ct plugin config delete <id> <key>

Delete a plugin config key

Positionals:
  id                                                         [string] [required]
  key                                                        [string] [required]

Options:
      --version  Show version number                                   [boolean]
      --json     Output in JSON format                [boolean] [default: false]
      --debug    Log HTTP request/response to stderr  [boolean] [default: false]
      --timeout  Request timeout in seconds               [number] [default: 10]
  -h, --help     Show help                                             [boolean]
```

#### `ct plugin schema`

```
ct plugin schema <id>

Show a plugin's declared config keys (required/secret/status/env)

Positionals:
  id                                                         [string] [required]

Options:
      --version  Show version number                                   [boolean]
      --json     Output in JSON format                [boolean] [default: false]
      --debug    Log HTTP request/response to stderr  [boolean] [default: false]
      --timeout  Request timeout in seconds               [number] [default: 10]
  -h, --help     Show help                                             [boolean]
```

#### `ct plugin run`

```
ct plugin run <id> [pluginArgs..]

Spawn a plugin's entrypoint with CT_* env vars (extra args are forwarded)

Positionals:
  id                                                         [string] [required]
  pluginArgs                                               [array] [default: []]

Options:
      --version  Show version number                                   [boolean]
      --json     Output in JSON format                [boolean] [default: false]
      --debug    Log HTTP request/response to stderr  [boolean] [default: false]
      --timeout  Request timeout in seconds               [number] [default: 10]
  -h, --help     Show help                                             [boolean]
```
